articles.title: ULTA: Evercore ISI Group Raises Price Target to $725, Maintains Outperform Rating | ULTA Stock News
articles.summary: Evercore ISI Group has raised its price target for Ulta Beauty (ULTA) from $660.00 to $725.00, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a 9.85% increase in the price target. Other analysts have also recently updated their ratings and price targets for ULTA, with an average target price of $690.11 among 23 analysts.
